summary: Batch 5: Teacher Experience Overhaul - All features tested and working. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (1 network timeout). Frontend: All 5 tabs working (Home, Availability, Earnings, My Students, Profile). Legacy files deleted (ClassroomTools.js, TeacherSidebar.js), no Classroom tab in sidebar.

minor.issue: Network timeout during test (not a code issue)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests updated bio and specializations for test teacher
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5 Teacher Experience Overhaul complete. Teacher dashboard has 5 tabs: Home (hero with next class or empty state, tier widget, earnings widget, stats widget), Availability (weekly grid with 30-min slots, bulk save), Earnings (credit card UI, request payout modal with bank fields), My Students (empty state or student table with detail drawer), Profile (personal info, specialties tags, bio, credentials placeholders). Commission rates: New 40%, Rated 35%, Elite 30%. system_settings collection has commission_tiers document. Stripe payouts are MOCKED.

step_0_legacy_cleanup.details: ClassroomTools.js and TeacherSidebar.js deleted. No Classroom tab in sidebar.

step_1_commission_tiers.details: GET /api/teacher/dashboard-data returns tier with commission_rate 0.40 for new teachers. system_settings seeded on startup.

step_2_dashboard_home.details: Hero empty state shows 'No upcoming classes', Tier widget shows 'New Tutor' with 0/20 progress, Earnings widget shows 'RM 0', Overview stats show rating and total classes.

step_3_availability_manager.details: Weekly grid renders with day headers (Sun-Sat) and 30-min time slots (6AM-10PM). POST /api/booking/availability/bulk saves slots. Click-to-toggle works.

step_4_earnings_wallet.details: Digital Credit Card shows balance, total earned, withdrawn, and platform fee (40%). Request Payout modal has Bank Name, Account Number, Account Holder, Amount fields. POST /api/teacher/request-payout validates fields and creates payout_requests document.

step_5_my_students.details: Students table with empty state 'No students yet'. GET /api/booking/teacher-students/{teacher_id} returns students list.

step_6_profile_settings.details: Personal info (name, phone, timezone), specialties tag selector, bio textarea, credentials upload placeholders. PUT /api/teacher/update-profile updates bio and specializations.

sidebar_tabs.details: 5 tabs present: Home, Availability, Earnings, My Students, Profile. No Classroom Tools tab.

header_profile_dropdown.details: Dropdown shows Teacher badge, My Profile, Support, Log Out. No Settings option.

mocked_apis.payout_bank_transfers: Teacher payout bank transfers are MOCKED - payout requests saved to DB but no actual bank transfer
